## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting for Logic's engagement with growthx.ai to develop a content strategy and execution plan.](https://fathom.video/share/Y5xYsGY1ytRkbWNsRyXhARjK54jeDXmt?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Logic is pivoting from positioning as an ops-focused tool to a broader process automation solution for various business functions](https://fathom.video/share/Y5xYsGY1ytRkbWNsRyXhARjK54jeDXmt?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [Content creation has been successful for Logic in the past, but time-consuming; they seek help scaling production while maintaining quality](https://fathom.video/share/Y5xYsGY1ytRkbWNsRyXhARjK54jeDXmt?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [Logic's key differentiator is rapid time-to-value for automating processes, often within minutes or hours](https://fathom.video/share/Y5xYsGY1ytRkbWNsRyXhARjK54jeDXmt?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
  - [Current customer acquisition is primarily through the founder's network; they aim to expand reach](https://fathom.video/share/Y5xYsGY1ytRkbWNsRyXhARjK54jeDXmt?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)

## Topics

### Logic's Product and Positioning

  - [Logic helps teams automate enterprise processes by turning documents into automated workflows](https://fathom.video/share/Y5xYsGY1ytRkbWNsRyXhARjK54jeDXmt?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [Key differentiator: Rapid time-to-value, often automating processes within minutes/hours](https://fathom.video/share/Y5xYsGY1ytRkbWNsRyXhARjK54jeDXmt?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
  - [Shifting positioning from ops-focused to broader process automation for various business functions](https://fathom.video/share/Y5xYsGY1ytRkbWNsRyXhARjK54jeDXmt?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Target company size: 10-500 employees, focusing on Series A/B tech-forward companies](https://fathom.video/share/Y5xYsGY1ytRkbWNsRyXhARjK54jeDXmt?tab=summary&timestamp=1422.0)
  - [Unique selling points:](https://fathom.video/share/Y5xYsGY1ytRkbWNsRyXhARjK54jeDXmt?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)
      - [Can automate existing SOPs without rewriting](https://fathom.video/share/Y5xYsGY1ytRkbWNsRyXhARjK54jeDXmt?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
      - [Provides testing, versioning, and rollback features](https://fathom.video/share/Y5xYsGY1ytRkbWNsRyXhARjK54jeDXmt?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
      - [Generates UIs and APIs for non-technical users](https://fathom.video/share/Y5xYsGY1ytRkbWNsRyXhARjK54jeDXmt?tab=summary&timestamp=1077.0)

### Current Customer Acquisition and Challenges

  - [Primary source: Founder's network and referrals](https://fathom.video/share/Y5xYsGY1ytRkbWNsRyXhARjK54jeDXmt?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [Content campaign (12-day series) drove significant interest](https://fathom.video/share/Y5xYsGY1ytRkbWNsRyXhARjK54jeDXmt?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [Waitlist of 100+ from content and fundraising announcement](https://fathom.video/share/Y5xYsGY1ytRkbWNsRyXhARjK54jeDXmt?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
  - [Challenges:](https://fathom.video/share/Y5xYsGY1ytRkbWNsRyXhARjK54jeDXmt?tab=summary&timestamp=1954.0)
      - [Overcoming "not invented here" syndrome with engineering teams](https://fathom.video/share/Y5xYsGY1ytRkbWNsRyXhARjK54jeDXmt?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
      - [Clarifying Logic's capabilities vs. custom-built solutions](https://fathom.video/share/Y5xYsGY1ytRkbWNsRyXhARjK54jeDXmt?tab=summary&timestamp=2191.0)
      - [Integrating with specific tools (e.g., QuickBooks) for some prospects](https://fathom.video/share/Y5xYsGY1ytRkbWNsRyXhARjK54jeDXmt?tab=summary&timestamp=2251.0)

### Content Strategy and Past Success

  - [Previous successful 12-day content campaign on LinkedIn](https://fathom.video/share/Y5xYsGY1ytRkbWNsRyXhARjK54jeDXmt?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [Process: Team brainstorming, prioritization, assignment based on expertise](https://fathom.video/share/Y5xYsGY1ytRkbWNsRyXhARjK54jeDXmt?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
  - [Content focused on engineering topics; need to expand to industry-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/Y5xYsGY1ytRkbWNsRyXhARjK54jeDXmt?tab=summary&timestamp=1513.0)
  - [Time-consuming to produce high-quality, original content with working code examples](https://fathom.video/share/Y5xYsGY1ytRkbWNsRyXhARjK54jeDXmt?tab=summary&timestamp=2903.0)
  - [Desire for guidance on content type, frequency, and distribution strategies](https://fathom.video/share/Y5xYsGY1ytRkbWNsRyXhARjK54jeDXmt?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Engagement Goals with growthx.ai

  - [Develop consistent content output to increase visibility and establish topical authority](https://fathom.video/share/Y5xYsGY1ytRkbWNsRyXhARjK54jeDXmt?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [Focus on industry-specific content (fintech, e-commerce, logistics) beyond engineering topics](https://fathom.video/share/Y5xYsGY1ytRkbWNsRyXhARjK54jeDXmt?tab=summary&timestamp=1786.0)
  - [Guidance on content strategy, creation, and distribution across channels (LinkedIn, Reddit, Hacker News)](https://fathom.video/share/Y5xYsGY1ytRkbWNsRyXhARjK54jeDXmt?tab=summary&timestamp=2555.0)
  - [Assistance in refining messaging and positioning as Logic expands its target market](https://fathom.video/share/Y5xYsGY1ytRkbWNsRyXhARjK54jeDXmt?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)

### Next Steps in the Engagement

1.  growthx.ai to send meeting recording and summary
2.  Erik to schedule a product deep-dive session
3.  Logic to provide access to analytics and any existing CMS
4.  Begin defining initial artifacts (company description, product, audience, writing guidelines)
5.  Week 2: Calibrate on topic clusters and initial artifacts
6.  Week 3: Start content production with an aggressive volume and speed approach

## Next Steps

  - [growthx.ai to send meeting summary and follow-up requests](https://fathom.video/share/Y5xYsGY1ytRkbWNsRyXhARjK54jeDXmt?tab=summary&timestamp=1352.0)
  - [Schedule recurring weekly checkpoint meetings](https://fathom.video/share/Y5xYsGY1ytRkbWNsRyXhARjK54jeDXmt?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)
  - [Logic to provide access to analytics and product demo materials](https://fathom.video/share/Y5xYsGY1ytRkbWNsRyXhARjK54jeDXmt?tab=summary&timestamp=1352.0)
  - [Begin work on initial artifacts and messaging framework](https://fathom.video/share/Y5xYsGY1ytRkbWNsRyXhARjK54jeDXmt?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)
  - [Prepare for deeper product demo and discussion in the next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/Y5xYsGY1ytRkbWNsRyXhARjK54jeDXmt?tab=summary&timestamp=1352.0)
